agents.name: Price Agent
agents.role: Pulls live quotes for the book and watchlist

agents.name: Desk Report
agents.role: Writes the deterministic daily desk report

agents.name: Watchdog
agents.role: Flags book tickers moving 5 percent or more

agents.name: Member Alerts
agents.role: Emails opted-in members when their names move past their threshold

agents.name: Signals
agents.role: Real technicals per name: EMA stack, RSI, MACD, trend read
